caption: The video features a speaker at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, dressed in a suit and tie, is engaged in delivering a presentation or interview, gesturing with his hand to emphasize points. The background shows a group of people standing and conversing, suggesting a lively and interactive atmosphere typical of such conferences. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text on the screen. The setting appears professional, with a focus on technology and innovation, aligning with the themes of MongoDB's global conference.
